message:
Dynamic-import WarStoriesMap and sanitize layout animation keys

app/war-stories/page.tsx:
- WarStoriesMap is now loaded via next/dynamic with ssr: false,
  preventing server-side rendering of the createPortal-based
  component which requires document.body. Shows a styled loading
  placeholder with LOADING_TACTICAL_MAP text while the chunk
  downloads
- FrankenEye made visible on mobile (same pattern as other pages:
  top-24 right-4 with scale-[1.2] on mobile, original desktop
  positioning via md: breakpoints)

components/war-stories-map.tsx:
- Node keys and layoutId values now use a sanitized storyId
  (spaces replaced with underscores via regex) instead of raw
  story.title strings. Framer Motion's layoutId must be stable
  and unique, and titles with special characters or spaces could
  cause animation glitches or React reconciliation issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
